LLM entrypoint for public TOS assets

GTM PPTX Media Assets

Raw llms.txt Search Page
299Original images
215Included assets

52Logos
84Excluded

GTM PPTX Media Assets

Purpose: public TOS asset index for Feishu GTM PPTX media. Use this file as the lightweight entrypoint. Do not load the CSV or full JSON unless needed.

Preview page: https://magic.solutionsuite.cn/html-box/vjC9AsKydQw

Load Strategy

  • Read this llms.txt first for scope, rules, and routing.
  • If you need icons only, fetch icons.json.
  • If you need logos only, fetch logos.json.
  • If you need excluded/not-now assets, fetch excluded.json or not-needed-now.md.
  • Use assets-index.csv only for spreadsheet review. Use assets-index.json only for full automation.

Public URLs

  • Search page: https://magic-builder.tos-cn-beijing.volces.com/gtm/pptx-media/v1/index.html
  • Icons JSON: https://magic-builder.tos-cn-beijing.volces.com/gtm/pptx-media/v1/icons.json
  • Logos JSON: https://magic-builder.tos-cn-beijing.volces.com/gtm/pptx-media/v1/logos.json
  • Excluded JSON: https://magic-builder.tos-cn-beijing.volces.com/gtm/pptx-media/v1/excluded.json
  • CSV table: https://magic-builder.tos-cn-beijing.volces.com/gtm/pptx-media/v1/assets-index.csv
  • Full JSON: https://magic-builder.tos-cn-beijing.volces.com/gtm/pptx-media/v1/assets-index.json
  • Usage: https://magic-builder.tos-cn-beijing.volces.com/gtm/pptx-media/v1/USAGE.md
  • Not needed now: https://magic-builder.tos-cn-beijing.volces.com/gtm/pptx-media/v1/not-needed-now.md

Summary

  • Original images: 299
  • Included public assets: 215
  • Uploaded public TOS links: 215
  • Icons: 163
  • Logos: 52
  • Excluded for now: 84

Rules

  • Public pool includes only high-reuse icons and logos.
  • Do not treat screenshots, marketing slogans, metrics text, photos, decorative lines, or placeholder logos as reusable assets.
  • Logo assets should not be stretched, cropped, recolored, or used without brand authorization where applicable.
  • Icon assets are for concepts, process nodes, status labels, and capability matrices; pair them with short labels.
  • Every asset URL is public. Do not upload sensitive customer material to this pool.

High-Frequency Icons

  • 安全锁 (lock-security-line): https://magic-builder.tos-cn-beijing.volces.com/gtm/pptx-media/v1/icons/lock-security-line-fe919930.png
